name: IdentifyDuplicatePolylines
description: Computes a normalized signature for each polyline to handle differences in start point and direction. Groups those with identical signatures and outputs the duplicate indexes.

inputParameters.name: polylines
inputParameters.description: List of polyline objects to check for duplicates.

outputParameters.name: duplicateIndices
outputParameters.description: DataTree of duplicate indexes. Each branch is one duplicate group. First occurrence is excluded from each group.
